vision_report.narrative_description: The audit confirms a complete systemic loss of the registered botanical collection. The pots contain only soil and inert debris. The 'White Rabbit' anchor in P3 remains, but the Pothos is absent. The environment has been modified by the introduction of non-botanical objects, but no plant life has been observed throughout the 5-day sequence.
